assessment_objectives.objective: on at least an annual basis, a threat assessment is performed to identify and assess applicable internal and external threats.
a threat catalog captures applicable internal and external threats from the threat assessment.
the scope of Attack Surface Management (ASM) is defined.
vulnerability scanning activities are performed against the scope of ASM to identify applicable vulnerabilities.
the organization documents the potential impact(s) and likelihood(s) of applicable internal and external threats exploiting known vulnerabilities.
each item in the threat catalog is prioritized, based on potential impact(s) and likelihood(s) of applicable internal and external threats exploiting identified vulnerabilities.
